response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience across diverse stacks (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, C/C++, Java) and demonstrated craftsmanship through TDD, workshops, and open-source work. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging systems, A/B testing frameworks, or large-scale telemetry/metrics infrastructure — the core focus of this Principal/IC6 role. Title progression has been Senior/Staff rather than Principal-level, and there is limited evidence of cross-team platform leadership at the scale this role requires.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering background spanning web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Strong testing/craftsmanship culture: TDD advocate, founded test tooling (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), runs workshops
High-scale low-latency experience at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic (millions of HTTP req/sec)
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, or A/B test frameworks
Limited evidence of telemetry/metrics platform work or statistical analysis at scale
Career has been Senior/Staff IC rather than Principal-level with multi-team platform ownership

key_factors.factor: Strong engineering fundamentals and high-scale backend experience
